description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem three-winding transformers. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = atr3real(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = atr3real(sid, owner, ties, flag, entry, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: A flag indicating owner usage if ownership is a subsystem selection criterion (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem three-winding transformers to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem three-winding transformers to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: A flag indicating organization. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the transformer quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem three-winding transformers only.
for subsystem tie three-winding transformers only.
for both interior subsystem and tie three-winding transformers.

string.description: Actual bus voltage magnitude at the star point bus, in pu.
Bus voltage phase angle at the star point bus, in degrees.
Active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
